text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I fear that something bizarre is happening
to me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Worry not—it has nothing to do with my physical
condition. I simply... feel absolutely buoyant with
joy.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pitting myself against such powerful rivals has me
feeling as though I am walking on air...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Try as I might, I cannot control these emotions...
What should I do?
choice_data_list: Just take the moment to bask in your happiness.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But my parents are always level-headed and
never get worked up over anything...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You make a valid point...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I am inclined to let this unnamed
sensation wash over me right now...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And I do not believe there is anything inherently
wrong with that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is next. I cannot wait to see
what my competition will be like.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What are you laughing about?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You saw that? I'm just happy to see our
juniors having fun.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Back in the new year, you declared you'd become
an obstacle to them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Why'd you say so?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, obstacles are meant to be overcome, right?
Significant growth can't happen without
conquering significant hurdles.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And if they don't improve enough, then we'll be the ones in trouble.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You get it too, don't you? If not with your head,
then with your heart.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I were to describe what it's like... Oh, yes. It's
like parental love for one's children.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh? There she goes. I must say, though... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Racing sure is fun.
